display_text: Keeper of the Light Aghanim's Scepter: Will-O-Wisp summons a mesmerising ward that draws enemies closer. This upgrade counters enemy positioning and movement, forcing foes into unfavorable engagements or disrupting their retreat.
search_text: Keeper of the Light Aghanim Scepter counter-positioning disrupt movement control force engagement

display_text: Keeper of the Light Aghanim's Shard: Enhances Illuminate's healing capability. This upgrade shifts his role into a more reliable support, countering sustained damage by providing amplified survivability for allies during prolonged engagements.
search_text: Keeper of the Light Aghanim Shard counter-sustain damage support role Illuminate heal
